prompt_text:
### Demographics: 53-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 11 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia; Mild dyspepsia and bloating

### History
- Other conditions: ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF (No); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Liraglutide 1.8mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 77.9 kg; Height 151.9 cm; BMI 33.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 134/73 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.9%; 9 months ago 9.5%; 6 months ago 9.0%; 3 months ago 8.5%; current 8.4%), FPG (12 months ago 264mg/dL; 9 months ago 266mg/dL; 6 months ago 213mg/dL; 3 months ago 234mg/dL; current 231mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 80.2kg; 9 months ago 77.7kg; 6 months ago 75.8kg; 3 months ago 78.1kg; current 77.9kg), Height (12 months ago 151.9cm; 9 months ago 151.9cm; 6 months ago 151.9cm; 3 months ago 151.9cm; current 151.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 35.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 34.0kg/m²; current 33.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 135mmHg; 9 months ago 135mmHg; 6 months ago 134mmHg; 3 months ago 134mmHg; current 134mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 73mmHg; 9 months ago 74mmHg; 6 months ago 72mmHg; 3 months ago 72mmHg; current 73mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 45U/L; 9 months ago 51U/L; 6 months ago 47U/L; 3 months ago 39U/L; current 47U/L), AST (12 months ago 46U/L; 9 months ago 43U/L; 6 months ago 34U/L; 3 months ago 32U/L; current 40U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 102mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 102mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 98mL/min/1.73m²; current 100mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 100mg/g; 9 months ago 102mg/g; 6 months ago 75mg/g; 3 months ago 70mg/g; current 84mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 80mg/dL; 9 months ago 76mg/dL; 6 months ago 79mg/dL; 3 months ago 77mg/dL; current 78mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 55mg/dL; 9 months ago 52mg/dL; 6 months ago 55mg/dL; 3 months ago 52mg/dL; current 54mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 127mg/dL; 9 months ago 113mg/dL; 6 months ago 127mg/dL; 3 months ago 114mg/dL; current 121mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.8g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 11.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
